author: Lucky AI Team
name: lucky-ai
short: AI-powered roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, and debates
description: Full-featured Discord AI cog with roasts, TLDR summaries, greentext recaps, chat Q&A, debate judging, and hot takes. Supports 7 AI providers (NVIDIA, Groq, OpenAI, Moonshot, DeepSeek, Zhipu AI, OpenRouter) with automatic fallback. Interactive settings UI, per-guild configuration, cooldowns, opt-out, and blacklist support.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord message IDs, user IDs, and message content in a local SQLite database for AI processing (roasts, TLDRs, Q&A). Message content is only stored from channels explicitly configured by server admins. Users can opt out via `[p]loptout out`.
